name: Oyster Enterprises Acquisition Corp.
summary: Oyster Enterprises Acquisition Corp. does not have significant operations. It intends to effect a merger, capital stock exchange, asset acquisition, stock purchase, reorganization, or similar business combination with one or more businesses in the media, technology, consumer products, industrials, real estate services, financial services, hospitality, and entertainment sectors. The company was incorporated in 2020 and is based in Stamford, Connecticut.
